thinking:
I'm in the Studio. The chimney (UP) won't let me climb with my current load. I'm carrying: brass lantern, sword, painting.

That's 3 items. I need to figure out which to drop. The painting is the treasure I need. The lamp is essential for light. The sword... I should drop it here and come back for it later (or leave it - I already have the painting).

Let me drop the sword and try again.

somaSnapshot.identity:
I am an explorer in a strange underground world. I observe carefully, think about what I see, and act decisively. I map the places I visit, track items I find, and solve puzzles by reasoning about what I know.

When I die, I start over — but I keep my hard-earned wisdom. Each life I should use what I learned to get further, faster.

somaSnapshot.history:
> move rug
With a great effort, the rug is moved to one side of the room, revealing the dusty cover of a closed trap door.


> open trap door
The door reluctantly opens to reveal a rickety staircase descending into darkness.


> turn on lamp
The brass lantern is now on.


> go down
The trap door crashes shut, and you hear someone barring it.
Cellar
You are in a dark and damp cellar with a narrow passageway leading north, and a crawlway to the south. On the west is the bottom of a steep metal ramp which is unclimbable.
Your sword is glowing with a faint blue glow.


> go south
East of Chasm
You are on the east edge of a chasm, the bottom of which cannot be seen. A narrow passage goes north, and the path you are on continues to the east.
Your sword is no longer glowing.


> go east
Gallery
This is an art gallery. Most of the paintings have been stolen by vandals with exceptional taste. The vandals left through either the north or west exits.
Fortunately, there is still one chance for you to be a vandal, for on the far wall is a painting of unparalleled beauty.


> take painting
Taken.


> go north
Studio
This appears to have been an artist's studio. The walls and floors are splattered with paints of 69 different colors. Strangely enough, nothing of value is hanging here. At the south end of the room is an open door (also covered with paint). A dark and narrow chimney leads up from a fireplace

> take paper
Taken.


> go up
You can't get up there with what you're carrying.


> drop paper
Dropped.


> go up
You can't get up there with what you're carrying.


> drop sword
Dropped.
somaSnapshot.inner_voice:
I'm in the Studio. The chimney (UP) won't let me climb with my current load. I'm carrying: brass lantern, sword, painting.

That's 3 items. I need to figure out which to drop. The painting is the treasure I need. The lamp is essential for light. The sword... I should drop it here and come back for it later (or leave it - I already have the painting).

Let me drop the sword and try again.
somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.history:
Cellar
You are in a dark and damp cellar with a narrow passageway leading north, and a crawlway to the south. On the west is the bottom of a steep metal ramp which is unclimbable.
Your sword is glowing with a faint blue glow.


> go south
East of Chasm
You are on the east edge of a chasm, the bottom of which cannot be seen. A narrow passage goes north, and the path you are on continues to the east.
Your sword is no longer glowing.


> go east
Gallery
This is an art gallery. Most of the paintings have been stolen by vandals with exceptional taste. The vandals left through either the north or west exits.
Fortunately, there is still one chance for you to be a vandal, for on the far wall is a painting of unparalleled beauty.


> take painting
Taken.


> go north
Studio
This appears to have been an artist's studio. The walls and floors are splattered with paints of 69 different colors. Strangely enough, nothing of value is hanging here. At the south end of the room is an open door (also covered with paint). A dark and narrow chimney leads up from a fireplace

> take paper
Taken.


> go up
You can't get up there with what you're carrying.


> drop paper
Dropped.


> go up
You can't get up there with what you're carrying.


> drop sword
Dropped.


> go up
Kitchen
On the table is an elongated brown sack, smelling of hot peppers.
A bottle is sitting on the table.
The glass bottle contains:
  A quantity of water


> go west
Living Room


> put painting in trophy case
The trophy case isn't open.
somaSnapshot.inner_voice: I'm in the Living Room with the painting! I need to deposit it in the trophy case right now.
somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

When I die, I start over — but I keep my hard-earned wisdom. Each life I should use what I learned to get further, faster.
somaSnapshot.goal: Explore thoroughly. Find treasures and bring them to safety. Solve puzzles. Survive. Maximize my score. Each life, push further than the last.

somaSnapshot.history:
Your sword is no longer glowing.


> go east
Gallery
This is an art gallery. Most of the paintings have been stolen by vandals with exceptional taste. The vandals left through either the north or west exits.
Fortunately, there is still one chance for you to be a vandal, for on the far wall is a painting of unparalleled beauty.


> take painting
Taken.


> go north
Studio
This appears to have been an artist's studio. The walls and floors are splattered with paints of 69 different colors. Strangely enough, nothing of value is hanging here. At the south end of the room is an open door (also covered with paint). A dark and narrow chimney leads up from a fireplace

> take paper
Taken.


> go up
You can't get up there with what you're carrying.


> drop paper
Dropped.


> go up
You can't get up there with what you're carrying.


> drop sword
Dropped.


> go up
Kitchen
On the table is an elongated brown sack, smelling of hot peppers.
A bottle is sitting on the table.
The glass bottle contains:
  A quantity of water


> go west
Living Room


> put painting in trophy case
The trophy case isn't open.


> open trophy case
Opened.


> put painting in trophy case
Done.
somaSnapshot.inner_voice: I'm in the Living Room. I just opened the trophy case! Now I need to put the painting in it.
somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

Died: Oh, no! A lurking grue slithered into the room and devoured you!      ****  You have died  ****  Now, let's take a look here... Well, you probably deserve another chance. I can't quite fix you up comp
--- Life 6 (score: 45, steps: 1624) ---
Died: The troll swings it out of your reach. The flat of the troll's axe hits you delicately on the head, knocking you out. Conquering his fears, the troll puts you to death. It appears that that last blow 
--- Life 7 (score: 35, steps: 1680) ---
Died: The troll fends you off with a menacing gesture. The troll neatly removes your head. It appears that that last blow was too much for you. I'm afraid you are dead.      ****  You have died  ****  Now,

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.

- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

Up (to Deep Canyon) → NW (to Reservoir South) → SW (to Chasm) → Up (to E-W Passage) → W (to Troll Room) → S (to Cellar) → Up (to Living Room via open trap door).

The troll is dead this life, so the Troll Room is clear.
somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.identity:
I am an explorer in a strange underground world. I observe carefully, think about what I see, and act decisively. I map the places I visit, track items I find, and solve puzzles by reasoning about what I know.

When I die, I start over — but I keep my hard-earned wisdom. Each life I should use what I learned to get further, faster.
somaSnapshot.goal: Explore thoroughly. Find treasures and bring them to safety. Solve puzzles. Survive. Maximize my score. Each life, push further than the last.

somaSnapshot.history:
> go north
The Troll Room
A nasty-looking troll, brandishing a bloody axe, blocks all passages out of the room.
Your sword has begun to glow very brightly.


> kill troll with sword
The haft of your sword knocks out the troll.


> kill troll with sword
The unarmed troll cannot defend himself: He dies.
Almost as soon as the troll breathes his last breath, a cloud of sinister black fog envelops him, and when the fog lifts, the carcass has disappeared.
Your sword is no longer glowing.


> go east
East-West Passage
This is a narrow east-west passageway. There is a narrow stairway leading down at the north end of the room.


> go down
Chasm
A chasm runs southwest to northeast and the path follows it. You are on the south side of the chasm, where a crack opens into a passage.


> go northeast
Reservoir South
You are in a long room on the south shore of a large lake, far too deep and wide for crossing.
There is a path along the stream to the east or west, a steep pathway climbing southwest along the edge of a chasm, and a path leading into a canyon to the southeast.


> go southeast
Deep Canyon
You are on the south edge of a deep canyon. Passages lead off to the east, northwest and southwest. A stairway leads down. You can hear the sound of flowing water from below.


> go down
Loud Room
This is a large room with a ceiling which cannot be detected from the ground. There is a narrow passage from east to west and a stone stairway leading upward. The room is deafeningly loud with an undetermined rushing sound. The sound seems to reverberate from all of the walls, making it di

> say ECHO
echo echo ...


> get platinum bar
bar bar ...


> inventory
inventory inventory ...


> go up
Deep Canyon


> go northwest
Reservoir South

- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

When I die, I start over — but I keep my hard-earned wisdom. Each life I should use what I learned to get further, faster.
somaSnapshot.goal: Explore thoroughly. Find treasures and bring them to safety. Solve puzzles. Survive. Maximize my score. Each life, push further than the last.

Score: 50/350 | Step: 1737 | Life: 8

somaSnapshot.memory:
Life 8: Score 45, step 1708. ~292 steps remain. CRITICAL budget.
Painting deposited. Trap door open in Living Room.
ROUTE TO LOUD ROOM: Down → Cellar → N → Troll Room (troll dead) → E → E-W Passage → Down (N end) → Chasm → NE → Reservoir South → SE → Deep Canyon → Down → Loud Room → say ECHO → get platinum bar.
THEN: Back same route to Living Room, deposit platinum bar.
Sword dropped in Studio. No sword but troll is dead so OK.
Priority: platinum bar first (worth 10+ points), then explore for more treasures.
somaSnapshot.history:
East-West Passage
This is a narrow east-west passageway. There is a narrow stairway leading down at the north end of the room.


> go down
Chasm
A chasm runs southwest to northeast and the path follows it. You are on the south side of the chasm, where a crack opens into a passage.


> go northeast
Reservoir South
You are in a long room on the south shore of a large lake, far too deep and wide for crossing.
There is a path along the stream to the east or west, a steep pathway climbing southwest along the edge of a chasm, and a path leading into a canyon to the southeast.


> go southeast
Deep Canyon
You are on the south edge of a deep canyon. Passages lead off to the east, northwest and southwest. A stairway leads down. You can hear the sound of flowing water from below.


> go down
Loud Room

somaSnapshot.inner_voice:
I'm at the Troll Room with the platinum bar (from the Loud Room - I said ECHO and got it). Now I need to get back to the Living Room to deposit it.

Route: Troll Room → S (Cellar) → Up (Living Room)

Wait - the trap door is BARRED from below! That's my hard-earned wisdom. But in Life 8, I noted "Trap door open in Living Room" - meaning the trap door was opened from above (which is how I descended). But can I go UP through it?

Actually, re-reading my notes: "Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way." This is a key constraint.

The route UP must be via Studio → chimney → Kitchen → W → Living Room.

But to get to Studio, I need to go: Cellar → S → East of Chasm → E → Gallery → N → Studio → Up → Kitchen → W → Living Room.

Let me go south to Cellar first.
somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

Died: drowned in flood water

Died: The troll swings it out of your reach. The flat of the troll's axe hits you delicately on the head, knocking you out. Conquering his fears, the troll puts you to death. It appears that that last blow

Died: The troll fends you off with a menacing gesture. The troll neatly removes your head. It appears that that last blow was too much for you. I'm afraid you are dead.      ****  You have died  ****  Now,

somaSnapshot.inner_voice:
Looking at my situation carefully:

- I'm in Studio (just came from Gallery → Studio)
- Score is 50/350, step 1742
- Budget CRITICAL: only 258 steps remain!
- I have sword and lantern
- The platinum bar... wait. I went to Loud Room, said ECHO, then "get platinum bar" - but the response was "bar bar ..." which means the acoustics were still messing with my commands!

Actually, looking back at the transcript: after "say ECHO" I got "echo echo..." then "get platinum bar" got "bar bar..." which means the echo effect was repeating my words back. That means the ECHO command didn't work properly, OR the item wasn't there (thief may have taken it).

My score is still 50 - same as before. So the platinum bar was NOT successfully retrieved!

Also - I'm in Studio with the ZORK owner's manual. But my trophy case notes say it's already there. Let me check - score 50 suggests I haven't deposited it this life.

Most importantly: I need to go UP the chimney to Kitchen NOW to deposit what I have. But I'm carrying nothing valuable!

Let me go up to Kitchen, then to Living Room to check the trophy case status, then plan next steps.
somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.inner_voice:
Looking at my situation:

I'm in the Living Room. The trap door is now open (I just opened it). I have a sword and brass lantern. Score is 50.

My goal is to get the platinum bar from the Loud Room. The route is:
Living Room → Down (Cellar) → N (Troll Room) → E (E-W Passage) → Down (Chasm) → NE (Reservoir South) → SE (Deep Canyon) → Down (Loud Room) → say ECHO → get platinum bar → return same route.

But wait - my memory says "Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way." So once I go down to the cellar, I can't come back up through the trap door. The return route must be: Loud Room → E (Damp Cave) → E (White Cliffs Beach)... no that's a dead end with water death.

Actually, looking at my route from previous lives: the painting was retrieved via Studio → Up → Kitchen → W → Living Room (chimney route). For the platinum bar, I need to go down to the cellar and come back via... the only return route from underground is Studio→chimney→Kitchen→W→Living Room.

So the full plan:
1. Go down to Cellar (from Living Room trap door)
2. Navigate to Loud Room: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room
3. Say ECHO, get platinum bar
4. Return: Up→Deep Canyon→NW→Reservoir South→SW→Chasm→Up→E-W Passage→W→Troll Room→S→Cellar→S→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→N→Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room→deposit

Budget is critical (252 steps remain at step 1748). Let me move fast.
somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

When I die, I start over — but I keep my hard-earned wisdom. Each life I should use what I learned to get further, faster.
somaSnapshot.goal: Explore thoroughly. Find treasures and bring them to safety. Solve puzzles. Survive. Maximize my score. Each life, push further than the last.

somaSnapshot.inner_voice:
Looking at my situation:

I'm in East-West Passage. I need to go WEST to Troll Room, then further to get to the Loud Room via the proper route.

Wait - my map shows:
- Round Room is EAST of E-W Passage
- Loud Room is WEST of Round Room

So the route is: E-W Passage → E → Round Room → W → Loud Room

But I just went E→Round Room→W→E-W Passage in circles! I need to go EAST to Round Room, then WEST to Loud Room.

Wait, I was JUST in Round Room and went West back to E-W Passage. Let me re-read: "Round Room: W → Loud Room, E → East-West Passage". So from Round Room, W = Loud Room.

I went: Round Room → W → E-W Passage. That means W from Round Room = E-W Passage, not Loud Room!

Let me reconsider. My map says "W → Loud Room" but maybe that's wrong. Let me go back to Round Room and try different directions to find Loud Room.

Budget is CRITICAL. Let me move fast.
somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.

- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.inner_voice: I have the platinum bar! I'm at East-West Passage. I need to go west to Troll Room, then south to Cellar, then up to Living Room to deposit it.
somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.inner_voice:
I'm in the Cellar. The trap door just crashed shut (barred from below again). I need to get the platinum bar from the Loud Room.

Route: N → Troll Room → E → E-W Passage → Down → Chasm → NE → Reservoir South → SE → Deep Canyon → Down → Loud Room → say ECHO → get platinum bar → back same way → East of Chasm → N → Cellar → ... wait, trap door is barred!

The problem: I can't get back to Living Room through the trap door once I go down. The only way to deposit treasures is:
- Studio → Up → Kitchen → W → Living Room

So I need to go get the platinum bar, then route through Studio→Kitchen→Living Room.

Route from Loud Room to deposit: Up → Deep Canyon → NW → Reservoir South → SW → Chasm → Down → E-W Passage → W → Troll Room → S → Cellar → S → East of Chasm → E → Gallery → N → Studio → Up → Kitchen → W → Living Room → deposit.

But wait - I have the sword! I dropped sword in Studio last time. Let me check - in "what just happened" I dropped sword in Studio. But now I'm carrying garlic and sword... wait, inventory says: garlic, sword, brass lantern.

Let me head north to Troll Room first.
somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

When I die, I start over — but I keep my hard-earned wisdom. Each life I should use what I learned to get further, faster.

somaSnapshot.inner_voice: I'm in the Loud Room, I said ECHO, and the platinum bar is here. Now I need to pick it up!
somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.inner_voice:
I'm in the Cellar with the platinum bar, and the trap door is closed/barred. I cannot go up through it. I need to get back to Living Room via the chimney route: Cellar → S → East of Chasm → E → Gallery → N → Studio → Up → Kitchen → W → Living Room.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

Route: E → E-W Passage → Down → Chasm → NE → Reservoir South → SE → Deep Canyon → Down → Loud Room → say ECHO → get platinum bar → Up → Deep Canyon → NW → Reservoir South → SW → Chasm → Up → E-W Passage → W → Troll Room → S → Cellar → S → East of Chasm → E → Gallery → N → Studio → Up → Kitchen → W → Living Room → deposit.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:

- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

So I need to go: Troll Room → E → E-W Passage → ... no, I need to get to Studio.

Route to Studio: E → East-West Passage → but Studio is accessed via Gallery → East of Chasm → Cellar → S.

From Troll Room: S → Cellar → S → East of Chasm → E → Gallery → N → Studio → Up → Kitchen → W → Living Room → deposit platinum bar!

Let me go!
somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- CHIMNEY: "Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys" = you CANNOT go down from Kitchen. The chimney is ONE-WAY: Studio→UP→Kitchen only. Must reach Studio via underground route.
- LOUD ROOM: The room's acoustics prevent taking items normally. The word "ECHO" must be said/typed to solve the acoustic puzzle and allow picking up the platinum bar.
- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.
- Troll in Troll Room can be killed with sword (takes a few hits).
- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.

- Trap door to cellar is BARRED from below — can't return to Living Room that way.

- Sword glows blue when monsters are nearby.
- Trophy case in Living Room = deposit treasures for points.
- DAM BOLT: gunk is NOT a lubricant. The dam puzzle requires something not yet found. ABANDON ENTIRELY until late game.
- STUDIO: Reach via underground: Cellar→N→Troll Room→E→E-W Passage→Down→Chasm→NE→Reservoir South→SE→Deep Canyon→Down→Loud Room, then find Gallery connection. OR: Cellar→East of Chasm→E→Gallery→find Studio.
- GALLERY connects to Studio (from Zork lore - Gallery is S of Studio or nearby)
- PRIORITY: Get to Studio, grab painting+platinum bar, carry to trophy case via chimney (Studio→Up→Kitchen→W→Living Room)
- DAM AREA IS A DEAD END FOR NOW. Don't go back until you know what's needed.
- WRENCH + SCREWDRIVER = useless until dam puzzle is solved. Drop them to save carry weight.
- TUBE OF GUNK = useless for now. Drop it.
- THIEF: dangerous, will kill you. Avoid combat with thief. He steals items.
